universities.name: National University of Lesotho
universities.description: The premier public university of Lesotho, founded in 1975. NUL offers comprehensive undergraduate and postgraduate programmes across Agriculture, Education, Health Sciences, Humanities, Law, Science & Technology, and Social Sciences.

universities.name: Lerotholi Polytechnic
universities.description: Lesotho's leading polytechnic institution, specialising in engineering, architecture, built environment, and technical vocational programmes. Established in 1905, LP trains skilled professionals for Lesotho's development.

universities.name: Lesotho College of Education
universities.description: The premier teacher education institution in Lesotho, dedicated to training qualified teachers for primary and secondary schools. LCE offers diploma and degree programmes in education.

universities.name: Botho University Lesotho
universities.description: A leading private university offering cutting-edge programmes in IT, Business, Accounting, and Health Sciences. Botho University is accredited by the Council on Higher Education of Lesotho.

universities.name: Limkokwing University of Creative Technology
universities.description: Specialised institution offering creative, technology, and business programmes with a focus on innovation and entrepreneurship. LUCT provides an industry-driven learning environment.

universities.name: African University College of Communications
universities.description: Specialist institution in communications, media studies, journalism, and public relations. AUCC trains media professionals for Lesotho's growing communications sector.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Agriculture
programs.description: A comprehensive programme covering crop science, soil science, animal science, and agricultural economics. Graduates are equipped to work in agricultural development, farming enterprises, and government institutions.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points in 6 subjects. Compulsory: Biology, Chemistry, and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural Economics
programs.description: Combines agricultural sciences with economic principles. Students study farm management, agribusiness, rural development, and agricultural policy. Career paths include agribusiness management and development planning.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and either Economics or Commerce at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Consumer Science
programs.description: Focuses on food science, nutrition, textile science, and family resource management. Prepares graduates for careers in food industries, retail, consumer advocacy, and home economics education.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Biology and Chemistry at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Range Resources & Ecology Management
programs.description: Studies range management, wildlife ecology, environmental conservation, and natural resource management. Graduates work with government departments, NGOs, and conservation organisations.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Biology and Chemistry at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Agriculture
programs.description: Practical agricultural training in crop production, livestock management, and agricultural extension. Designed to produce competent agricultural technicians for Lesotho's rural development.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Biology or Agriculture at grade D or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Nursing & Midwifery
programs.description: Comprehensive nursing education combining theoretical and clinical training. Graduates are qualified to practise as professional nurses in hospitals, clinics, and community health settings throughout Lesotho and beyond.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: Biology and Chemistry at grade C or better. English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Pharmacy
programs.description: Prepares students for careers in pharmaceutical sciences, drug dispensing, pharmacy management, and pharmaceutical research. One of the most competitive and sought-after programmes at NUL.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 16 points. Compulsory: Biology, Chemistry, and Mathematics at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Environmental Health
programs.description: Focuses on public health, environmental sanitation, occupational health, and disease prevention. Graduates work with the Ministry of Health, local authorities, and public health organisations.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Biology and Chemistry at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Laws (LLB)
programs.description: A rigorous legal education programme covering constitutional law, criminal law, civil procedure, commercial law, and customary law. Graduates pursue careers as lawyers, magistrates, and legal advisors.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better. Strong performance in Sesotho and any Social Sciences.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
programs.description: Comprehensive computer science education covering programming, algorithms, software engineering, artificial intelligence, and computer networks. Graduates are equipped for careers in software development and ICT management.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade B or better. Computer Science or Physical Science recommended.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Information Systems
programs.description: Combines IT with business management and systems analysis. Students learn database management, systems design, project management, and business intelligence. Graduates work in corporate IT departments and government.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Mathematics & Statistics
programs.description: A rigorous programme in pure and applied mathematics, statistical analysis, and data science. Graduates pursue careers in actuarial science, data analytics, research, and education.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade A or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Science in Human Geography
programs.description: Examines the relationship between human populations and their physical environment. Covers urban studies, population geography, GIS, and regional development. Graduates work in urban planning and development.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Geography at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Urban & Regional Planning
programs.description: Prepares planners who can manage urban growth, land use, housing, and infrastructure development. Graduates work with local authorities and government ministries on spatial development.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Geography and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Education (Primary)
programs.description: Prepares competent primary school teachers with subject specialisations. Students choose two teaching subjects and gain extensive practical school experience. Required for primary school teaching in Lesotho.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Education (Secondary)
programs.description: Trains secondary school teachers with specialist subject knowledge. Students choose two teaching subjects relevant to the secondary school curriculum. Includes practicum in secondary schools.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Special Education
programs.description: Focuses on inclusive education and teaching learners with special needs. Covers learning disabilities, hearing impairment, visual impairment, and intellectual disabilities. Graduates teach in mainstream and special schools.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Economics
programs.description: Studies economic theory, microeconomics, macroeconomics, development economics, and econometrics. Graduates work in banking, finance, government economic departments, and international organisations.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better. Economics or Commerce strongly recommended.

programs.name: Bachelor of Commerce in Accounting & Finance
programs.description: Comprehensive accounting and finance education covering financial reporting, auditing, taxation, and investment management. Graduates pursue professional qualifications such as ACCA or CIMA.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Accounting at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Commerce in Marketing
programs.description: Covers marketing strategy, consumer behaviour, digital marketing, brand management, and market research. Graduates work in advertising agencies, corporate marketing departments, and entrepreneurial ventures.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Commerce in Human Resource Management
programs.description: Focuses on human resource management, labour relations, organisational behaviour, and employment law. Graduates manage human capital in corporations, government, and NGOs.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Sociology
programs.description: Examines social structures, institutions, and human behaviour in society. Covers research methods, social stratification, gender studies, and community development. Graduates work in social development and research.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Social Work
programs.description: Trains professional social workers to support vulnerable individuals, families, and communities. Covers child protection, community development, and social policy. Graduates work with government, NGOs, and social services.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better. Biology recommended.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Public Administration
programs.description: Focuses on public sector management, government policy, administrative law, and public finance. Prepares graduates for careers in the civil service, local government, and public institutions.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication
programs.description: Covers journalism, broadcasting, digital media, public relations, and communication theory. Graduates work in newsrooms, broadcasting stations, and public relations firms.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Mass Communication & Journalism
programs.description: Practical journalism and media training covering news writing, broadcasting, digital media production, and media ethics. Graduates enter the media industry as journalists and media practitioners.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Political Science
programs.description: Examines political theory, government systems, international relations, and public policy. Graduates pursue careers in diplomacy, civil service, politics, and international organisations.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Pharmaceutical Technology
programs.description: Practical training in pharmaceutical technology, drug compounding, quality assurance, and pharmacy support. Graduates work as pharmacy technicians in hospitals and retail pharmacies.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Biology and Chemistry at grade C or better.

programs.name: Certificate of Secondary Education
programs.description: A professional upgrading certificate for practicing teachers seeking to improve their qualifications. Covers curriculum development, pedagogy, and subject content for secondary level teaching.
programs.entry_requirement: Holder of a Primary Teacher Certificate (PTC) with minimum 2 years teaching experience.

programs.name: Certificate of Proficiency in Insurance
programs.description: Introduces insurance principles, risk management, life and short-term insurance products. Suitable for professionals entering the insurance industry in Lesotho.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points or equivalent qualification.

programs.name: Bachelor of Engineering in Civil Engineering
programs.description: Prepares civil engineers for the design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure including roads, bridges, water supply, and buildings. Accredited by relevant engineering bodies.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 16 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Physics at grade B or better. English Language at grade C.

programs.name: Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering
programs.description: Covers electrical power systems, electronics, telecommunications, and control systems. Graduates design and maintain electrical infrastructure for industry, utilities, and government.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 16 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Physics at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Engineering in Irrigation & Drainage
programs.description: Specialised engineering programme focusing on water resources, irrigation systems, and drainage design. Critical for Lesotho's agricultural and water sector development.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Physics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Architecture
programs.description: A professional architecture degree covering design, structural engineering, urban design, and architectural history. Graduates are eligible to register with the Lesotho Council for Architects.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Art & Design at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Engineering
programs.description: Provides practical engineering skills in civil, mechanical, or electrical disciplines. Graduates work as engineering technicians and can progress to degree programmes.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Physics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Architectural Technology
programs.description: Technical training in building design, construction drawings, building technology, and project management. Graduates support architects and work in the building industry.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Certificate in Secretarial & Office Administration
programs.description: Practical office administration training covering office management, business communication, record keeping, and computer applications. Prepares graduates for administrative roles in organisations.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade D or better.

programs.name: Certificate in Building & Construction
programs.description: Practical training in bricklaying, plastering, carpentry, and general construction. Graduates work in the construction industry as skilled artisans and construction supervisors.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade D or better.

programs.name: Certificate in Electrical Installation
programs.description: Practical electrical training covering wiring, installation, maintenance, and electrical safety. Graduates work as electricians and electrical technicians in the construction and maintenance industry.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Physics at grade D or better.

programs.name: Certificate in STEM Foundation
programs.description: A bridging programme in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics for students who need to strengthen their fundamentals before entering engineering or science degree programmes.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with at least a pass in Mathematics and one Science subject.

programs.name: Primary Teacher Certificate (PTC)
programs.description: The foundation qualification for primary school teaching in Lesotho. Covers primary school curriculum subjects, teaching methods, child development, and classroom management. Required for all primary school teachers.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C and Mathematics at grade D or better.

programs.name: Secondary Teacher Certificate (STC)
programs.description: Qualifying certificate for secondary school teaching. Students specialise in two teaching subjects and develop professional teaching competencies. Required for secondary school teachers in Lesotho.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better. Strong performance in two chosen teaching subjects.

programs.name: Diploma in Primary Education
programs.description: Advanced primary education qualification for holders of the PTC. Covers curriculum leadership, educational management, and advanced pedagogical skills for primary school settings.
programs.entry_requirement: PTC or LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Education (Primary) at LCE
programs.description: A degree-level qualification in primary education for teachers aspiring to leadership roles in primary schools and the education system. Includes educational psychology, curriculum studies, and research methods.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 14 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Special Needs Education
programs.description: Trains teachers to work with learners who have physical, intellectual, visual, or hearing impairments. Covers inclusive education strategies, assistive technology, and special needs assessment.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Early Childhood Education
programs.description: Focuses on child development, early learning, and pre-primary education. Prepares graduates to work in creches, pre-schools, and early childhood centres. Covers child psychology and play-based learning.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: BSc Information Technology
programs.description: Covers software development, networking, database management, cybersecurity, and IT project management. Botho IT graduates are highly sought-after in Lesotho's growing ICT sector.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better. Computer Science recommended.

programs.name: BSc Computer Science
programs.description: In-depth study of programming, software engineering, machine learning, and computer systems. Graduates work in software development, artificial intelligence, and technology startups.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
programs.description: Comprehensive business education covering management, marketing, finance, operations, and entrepreneurship. Graduates lead businesses, manage departments, and start their own enterprises.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language and Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: BSc Accounting & Finance
programs.description: Prepares professional accountants and finance specialists. Curriculum aligns with ACCA and CIMA professional qualifications. Graduates work in auditing, banking, and financial management.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics and Accounting at grade C or better.

programs.name: BSc Human Resource Management
programs.description: Focuses on talent management, organisational development, labour law, and employee relations. Graduates manage human capital in corporations, government, and NGOs.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in IT Support
programs.description: Practical IT support skills including hardware maintenance, software troubleshooting, networking, and IT helpdesk operations. Prepares graduates for ICT technician roles.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade D or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Business Management
programs.description: Foundational business management training covering accounting, marketing, office administration, and entrepreneurship. Entry-level qualification for business and management roles.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language and Mathematics at grade D or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Design
programs.description: Covers graphic design, digital media design, branding, and visual communication. Graduates work in advertising agencies, design studios, and digital media companies.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Art & Design at grade C or better. Portfolio submission required.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Fashion Design & Technology
programs.description: Combines fashion design creativity with technology. Covers fashion illustration, garment construction, textile science, and fashion merchandising. Prepares graduates for the fashion and textile industry.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: Art & Design at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Media & Communication
programs.description: Covers digital media production, social media management, broadcasting, and communication theory. Prepares graduates for careers in the media and communications industry.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: BSc Architecture
programs.description: Combines creative design with technical engineering skills. Students learn architectural design, urban planning, structural systems, and sustainable design principles.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 12 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better. Art & Design highly recommended.

programs.name: Bachelor of Business & Entrepreneurship
programs.description: Combines business fundamentals with entrepreneurial skills. Students develop business plans, learn startup management, and study innovation. Ideal for aspiring entrepreneurs and business leaders.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.

programs.name: Diploma in Creative Design
programs.description: Practical creative arts and design training covering graphic design, photography, digital arts, and visual communication. A foundation programme for students entering the creative industries.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with at least a pass in English Language and Art & Design or equivalent.

programs.name: BSc Information & Communication Technology
programs.description: Covers ICT systems, mobile computing, web technologies, and digital transformation. Graduates drive digital innovation in organisations and government sectors.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: Mathematics at grade C or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication
programs.description: Specialist mass communication programme covering media theory, broadcasting, digital journalism, and audience analysis. AUCC's flagship programme preparing media professionals for Lesotho's communications landscape.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Journalism & Media Studies
programs.description: In-depth journalism training covering print, broadcast, and online journalism, investigative reporting, media law, and ethics. Graduates work as journalists, editors, and media managers.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Public Relations
programs.description: Covers corporate communications, crisis management, stakeholder engagement, and media relations. Graduates manage organisational reputation and communications for corporations and government.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 10 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade B or better.

programs.name: Bachelor of Arts in Film & TV Production
programs.description: Practical film and television production training covering screenwriting, directing, cinematography, editing, and broadcast production. Graduates work in film, television, and digital content production.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better. Creative portfolio or interview may be required.

programs.name: Diploma in Communications
programs.description: Foundation communications programme covering writing, public speaking, media literacy, and digital communications. A practical qualification for those seeking entry-level positions in communications and media.
programs.entry_requirement: LGCSE with minimum aggregate of 8 points. Compulsory: English Language at grade C or better.
